name: Cyrus vs. Cyrus: Design and Conquer
original_name: Cyrus vs. Cyrus: Design and Conquer
overview: After years of perfecting their passion for interior design in their own homes, Tish and Brandi Cyrus take their talents to the streets of their hometown, Nashville, to share their skills with friends and word-of-mouth clients.

trailers.title: Cyrus Vs. Cyrus: Official Trailer - Tish and Brandi Cyrus Battle Love and Decor (Season 1) | Bravo
